description: Locked inputs for Specter's Oracle JDBC bridge bundle (user-selected-Java model). Specter bundles ONLY its own tiny bridge jar — it does NOT bundle a JRE or Oracle driver jars. The Java runtime and Oracle JDBC driver are selected by the user in Settings → Database Drivers and are never vendored. Consumed by `npm run prepare:oracle-runtime`, which builds the bridge reproducibly (pinned JDK 17), stages it under resources/oracle-jdbc/bridge/, and regenerates checksums.json. See docs/ai/ORACLE_JDBC_RUNTIME_MATRIX.md.

java.notes: Specter does NOT bundle a JRE. Oracle live queries launch the isolated bridge with the java.exe the user selects in Settings → Database Drivers. System Java / JAVA_HOME / PATH are never auto-used.

driver.notes: Specter does NOT bundle an Oracle driver. The user imports an ojdbc*.jar into the Settings-managed driver store; it is never vendored into resources/. UCP is not supported.

tls.scope: Thin-driver TLS (TCPS) with optional Oracle Wallet; wallet path supplied per connection profile, never bundled.

artifacts.notes: Specter's own bridge jar — the only Oracle artifact bundled. Built reproducibly from oracle-jdbc-bridge/ (this repo's source); no third-party redistribution.
